title: Representative American Negroes
venue: James Pott and Company, New York

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Representative American Negroes (1903), by Paul Laurence Dunbar. From The Negro Problem.
excerpt: _ By PAUL LAURENCE DUNBAR An enumeration of some of the noteworthy American Negroes of to-day and yesterday, with some account of their lives and their work. In this paper Mr. Dunbar has turned out his largest and most successful picture of the colored people....
